name: Construct: Merchant Stall
description:
Completing this mission will instantly enhance your home island.

Craft a Jangling Pouch from simple tools and common building materials.  The Heart of the Island has already placed the recipe inside your mind.

New Infrastructure: Merchant Stall.  Build a structure where merchants from…somewhere…can come to your island and offer their wares to you.

effect.u_message:
You can't be the only person this is happening to, right?  Maybe there's a way to let others visit you, take time away from their islands to trade supplies or gear.  Time to get to work.
A new recipe has been learned.  Craft this artifact to permanently upgrade the island.

New Infrastructure: Merchant Stall.  Build a structure where merchants from…elsewhere…can come to your island and offer their wares to you.
Construction complete.  Merchants can now visit your island.

description:
This strange metaphysical artifact is used to build a structure on the island.  Will be used automatically upon crafting, and can only be used once.

ASSOCIATED BUILD: Merchant Stall.
